title: Remediate Dependabot governance bypass and restore audit trail

in: Remove Dependabot bypass from mk2-alteration-gate workflow
Create audit tooling to discover ungoverned Dependabot commits
Create restoration tooling to generate retroactive intent files
Add automated intent generation workflow for future Dependabot PRs
Document governance breach with forensic investigation
Restore governance for PR #17 with retroactive intent file
out: No changes to core governance logic or policy enforcement
No changes to receipt format or ledger structure
No changes to existing intent files (except adding retroactive ones)

verification.plan: 1. Run audit-dependabot.py to verify it detects the breach. 2. Run restore-dependabot-governance.py to verify it generates retroactive intents. 3. Run find-dependabot-origin.sh to verify forensic tracing. 4. Verify mk2-alteration-gate.yml no longer has bypass. 5. Verify dependabot-gate.yml workflow is valid. 6. Run CI gate to ensure exactly one intent file changed. 7. Verify documentation is complete.

evidence.notes:
CRITICAL GOVERNANCE BREACH REMEDIATION

This intent documents the discovery and remediation of a critical governance bypass that allowed Dependabot to merge PRs without any governance oversight.

Breach Details:
- Bypass condition: if: ${{ github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]' }}
- Location: .github/workflows/mk2-alteration-gate.yml line 12
- Introduced: commit b57661ca on 2026-02-16
- Impact: 1+ Dependabot PRs merged without intent files

Remediation Actions:
1. Created tools/audit-dependabot.py (audit tooling)
2. Created tools/restore-dependabot-governance.py (restoration tooling)
3. Created tools/find-dependabot-origin.sh (forensic investigation)
4. Removed bypass from mk2-alteration-gate.yml
5. Created .github/workflows/dependabot-gate.yml (automated compliance)
6. Generated retroactive intent for PR #17
7. Documented breach in docs/GOVERNANCE_BREACH_2026-02-16.md

This is a ROOT-level change because it:
- Modifies governance enforcement workflows
- Restores governance integrity
- Establishes new governance automation
- Documents systemic governance failure

See docs/GOVERNANCE_BREACH_2026-02-16.md for complete breach report.
